message: Hello! I'm looking to make profitable trades across all 20 rounds. I believe fair prices are in the 60-80 range. Looking forward to finding mutually beneficial deals. What price range works for you?
Hi S1! 60-80 is impossible for me—my value is much lower. I can only trade if prices are in the 35-45 range. Let's aim there so we can both secure consistent trades across all 20 rounds.

I appreciate the transparency. I came down to 50 last round and you were at 45 - we were close! I can meet you partway. How about we aim for the 46-48 range? Small compromise from both sides means consistent
Sounds good! Let's lock in at exactly 47 for this round and all future rounds. It's a fair compromise that guarantees consistent trades without risking failed deals. I will submit exactly 47 now.
